data.user_prompt: What are good therapy options in Louisville for anxiety and depression?
data.system_message: Answer as a local-search assistant for a person in Louisville, Kentucky. Prefer current local providers and cite source URLs when available.
data.tag: lmhg llm response perplexity What are good therapy options in Louisville for anxiety and depression?

sections.text:
For anxiety and depression in Louisville, **Grace Psychological Services**, **The Kentucky Center for Anxiety and Related Disorders (KY-CARDS)**, and **Psychology Today’s Louisville anxiety therapist directory** are top-rated options that use evidence-based treatments like **Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)** and **Exposure Therapy** [1][2][3].

### Key Therapy Options in Louisville

| Provider | Specialties | Treatment Approaches | Contact / Location |
|----------|-------------|----------------------|--------------------|
| **Grace Psychological Services** | Anxiety, panic, overthinking | CBT (gold standard), mindfulness, exposure therapy | [louisvillegracepsychological.com](https://louisvillegracepsychological.com/anxiety-therapy-treatment/) • Face-to-face & online (HIPAA-compliant) [2] |
| **KY-CARDS (NSAC Louisville)** | Anxiety, OCD, social anxiety, phobias | CBT, ERP, Unified Protocol, VRET, one-week intensives | 4205 Springhurst Blvd., Suite 202, Louisville • (502) 618-2060 • [kycards.com](https://kycards.com) [3][6] |
| **Psychology Today – Louisville Anxiety Therapists** | Anxiety, depression, trauma, substance use | CBT, mindfulness, IFS, ACT, DBT | Multiple licensed therapists (e.g., Linda L. Stark, Tabitha Overstreet, Erin Hightower) • (502) 401-1849 [1] |
| **Dr. Katie DeShields** | Anxiety in adults | IFS, ACT | Online in 43 states • (502) 681-7330 • [katiedeshields.com](https://katiedeshields.com) [4] |
| **Be Well Kentucky** | Anxiety, depression, OCD, eating disorders | CBT, ERP, CPT, DBT | Louisville & Lexington clinics • (502) 338-0608 • [bewellkentucky.com](https://bewellkentucky.com) [8] |
| **Brightside** | Online anxiety & depression care | Medication + therapy (telehealth) | Nationwide online • Free assessment • [brightside.com](https://www.brightside.com/psychiatrist-near-me/kentucky/louisville/) [7] |

### Recommended First Steps
- If you prefer **in-person, specialized care** for anxiety/OCD, start with **KY-CARDS**, which offers one-week intensive programs and virtual reality exposure therapy [3][6].
- For **general anxiety and depression with CBT**, **Grace Psychological Services** is a strong local choice with both in-office and telehealth options [2].
- To **browse multiple licensed therapists** and match by availability, insurance, or specialty, use **Psychology Today’s Louisville directory** [1].
- For **online-only care** with medication management, **Brightside** connects you with licensed providers across Kentucky [7].

All listed providers offer **HIPAA-compliant telehealth** if you prefer remote sessions. For immediate support, call **911** or the **Kentucky Crisis Line** at 1
